title: 日本ダービーの後に・どうしたって

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: That's great. I can tell I'm getting stronger. But...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
But this won't stop me! The legend of Teio is still
beginning.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I'll fly higher and higher, getting stronger and
stronger from here on out!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
She still feels so far away. No matter how hard I
try, it doesn't even seem like I'm getting any
closer to...
